root: ^NOUR: My first black shadow palette. Still going strong.
^NOUR: ...Though I really should throw out the one I have. It's been a few years.

dreamvisited: ^NOUR: Looks like the newer version of the palette we saw.
^NOUR: The packaging is different, but the colors look the same.
^NOUR: ...And of course it's tripled in price.
